creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This port has no maintainer. 

Please consider providing a patch to resolve the reported issue, and taking
maintainership to ensure this port remains up to date and of a high quality.

Additionally, if a .core file is produced after the core dump, you may be able to provide further information by providing a backtrace and additional information using gdb.

More information on debugging with gdb can be found here:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/debugging.html
